items.title: Best of June 2026!
items.content_html: Your votes are in and the Best of June have been decided!We kept the new art prize tiers from last month and have boosted 1st and 2nd place for movies and games, thanks to your support!If you’re one of the winners, please fill out the address form for payment. I’ll be chasing down holdouts later this week.Top Ten Movies ($400, $300, $200, $150, $100 for 5th-10th, $200 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1036674https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1038634https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1039736https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1035994https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1035096https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1035739https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1038591https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1038839https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1036638https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1038051The top movie based on original material and winner of $600 total is An Experiment 2. Congrats @Krinkels!Thank you @matt-likes-swords for the $100 sponsorship. Play Matt’s games on Steam!Top Ten Games ($400, $300, $200, $150, $100 for 5th-10th, $200 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1037212https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1036315https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1036523https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1039708https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1036184https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1039299https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1039332https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1037783https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1035732https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1039079The top game based on original material and winner of $500 total is Illegal Fat Gambling! Congrats @Sulfur-Cretin!@FuturecopLGF made a Best Games of June post, including a video with game feedback!A $100 bonus prize is going to Bounce, FuturecopLGF’s #1 game of the month and mine too!Thank you @MassiveMonster for the $200 sponsorship. Play Cult of the Lamb!Thank you @molkman for the $150 sponsorship. Play Lucky Tower Ultimate on Steam!Thank you @Afro-Ninja for the $150 sponsorship. Play Signy & Mino: Against All Gods on Steam! Thank you @PuffballsUnited for the $100 sponsorship. Play Among Us!Top Ten Music ($100 each for 1st-5th, $50 each for 6th-10th + $100 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1578945https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1586207https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1580263https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1581163https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1574251https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1582606https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1580940https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1583176https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1576951https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1574744The top song based on original material and winner of $200 total is Second Experiment. Congrats @cheshyre!Thank you @RobTop for the $500 sponsorship. Play Geometry Dash!Top Ten Art ($100 for First Place, $50 each for 2nd-10th)https://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/vippori/low-poly-day-2026-wall-arthttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/deimosart/old-world-blueshttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/infestedpear/concussionhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/hushpuppe/steelfang-knight-irwynhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/kornart3/sonic-colourshttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/kiwisburnttoast/jucika-slips-on-a-bananahttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/hushpuppe/night-lords-1st-clawhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/angeldrawrus/watch-outhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/dahliablackart/1-in-tha-hood-ghttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/vippori/goodbye-digital-circusCongrats @vippori for first place!A $50 bonus prize is going to Chill Day, a close runner-up in 11th place.Thank you @53xy83457 and @River for boosting our art prizes this month!Runner-Up Movies11. items.title: Best of May 2026!

items.title: Best of April 2026!
items.content_html: Your votes are in and the Best of April have been decided!Thanks to your Support, we have expanded the prize tiers this month, with bigger prizes for 1st and 2nd place movies and games. This is continuing the progress from last month, where we increase the number of prize tiers for movies, games and art.If all continues to go well, expect another boost next month with our Best of May.Top Ten Movies ($300 for 1st, $200 for 2nd, $100 for 3rd-10th + $200 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027581https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029774https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029578https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027144https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026057https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1028051https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027845https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1030399https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026610https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029228The top movie based on original material and winner of $500 total is WHY IS SHE WEIRD?? Congrats @HappyHarry!Thank you @matt-likes-swords for the $100 sponsorship.
